name: Two Peas with Turmeric and Mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a medium pot of water to a boil.
2. Snap the ends off the snap and snow peas.
3. Add the snap peas to the boiling water and cook for 30 seconds.
4. Add the snow peas and cook for 1 minute.
5. Drain and rinse with cold water to stop cooking completely.
6. Pat dry with paper towels.
7. In a medium skillet, heat the margarine and olive oil over medium heat.
8. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
9. Add the turmeric and lemon juice; swirl to incorporate.
10. Add the peas, mint, salt, and pepper. Stir for about 2 minutes until heated through.
11. Serve immediately.
